message:
Add graceful transport shutdown to HTTP/1.1 client and server

- client: Add into_inner() method on ClientIncomingBody for extracting
  the underlying transport. Call poll_close on the transport during
  connection teardown so TLS close_notify is sent before TCP FIN,
  preventing the peer from seeing a truncation attack false positive.

- server: Mirror the same graceful shutdown via poll_close in the server
  connection handler, ensuring the TLS session is cleanly terminated
  from both sides of the connection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
